description: Style NoteFor a large dose of fashionable style, and more than a touch of international attitude, look no further than french connection. This polo tee has been uniquely created to give an original spin to a tried and tested classic.Product DetailsBlack polo neck T-shirt with a spread collar, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, three button placket, branding in rubber print on the left chest and a small vents at side hemMaterial and Care100% cotton pique knitWash with similar coloursIron on reverseSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
